title: Nutty Dense Egyptian Pear Crumble
description: A vegan-friendly brunch dish featuring pears baked with a nutty topping that adds a unique twist to the classic pear crumble.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons almond butter
ingredients.amount: or any nut butter of choice

instructions: Core the pears and cut into wedges.
In a small bowl, mix almond butter with oatmeal until well combined. Add cinnamon and salt; mix again to combine.
Arrange pear slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or cooking spray.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over each slice of pear.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crisp.
Serve warm, topped with fresh berries if desired.
